metadata.description: Curated collection of production-ready Claude Code skills

plugins.name: gstack:plan-ceo-review
plugins.description: CEO/founder-mode plan review — rethink the problem, find the 10-star product, challenge premises, expand scope

plugins.name: gstack:plan-eng-review
plugins.description: Eng manager-mode plan review — lock in architecture, data flow, edge cases, test coverage, performance

plugins.name: gstack:review
plugins.description: Pre-landing PR review — analyzes diff against main for SQL safety, LLM trust boundary violations, and structural issues

plugins.name: gstack:ship
plugins.description: Ship workflow — merge main, run tests, review diff, bump VERSION, update CHANGELOG, commit, push, create PR

plugins.name: rails-authentication
plugins.description: End-to-end Rails 8 authentication setup with session management, OAuth, 2FA, and more
